message:
feat(signature): add import subcommand and bundle signature sharing (process_triage-ed3.4)

Bundle create now automatically includes user signatures at
signatures/user_signatures.json. New `pt signature import` command
loads signatures from .ptb bundles or plain JSON files with
duplicate-skip merge, --dry-run preview, and encrypted bundle support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
